service.description: Sends a system-level notification message to relevant parties (e.g., Applicant, CSR) when a Letter of Credit event occurs.

parameter.name: eventDescription
parameter.description: A human-readable description of the event (e.g., "LC Drafted", "LC Issued").

parameter.name: targetPartyId
parameter.description: Optionally specify a single party. If not specified, defaults to the Applicant.
